calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Milla Lvovich appearing via zoom for Mary Thompson (petitioner).

Mrs. Lvovich had nothing to add. The final report of executor etc. is taken under submission.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Continued To May-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Milla Lvovich appeared by zoom for Mary Todd Thompson (Petitioner).

The Court stated that extraordinary fee request is inappropriate and provided counsel with the option of amending her petition, or accepting the amounts that will be indicated by the Court. Mrs. Lvovich advocated for her fees and asked for the opportunity to amend her petition in order to request her fees in a different way. The Court indicated it has no issue with the $140,000 on authorized preliminary distribution. The Final report of the executor etc., is continued to May 22, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To Mar-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Continued To Aug-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milla Lvovich, via Zoom, for Mary T. Thompson, Personal Representative.

The court queries counsel regarding the distribution of $140k made without court approval. Ms. Lvovich reports that the distribution consisted of treasury bonds in the decedent's name and that her client is the sole beneficiary and that there are no pending creditor's claims. Ms. Lvovich advises that her client has the proceeds in the estate account and that a petition for final distribution will be filed forthwith. The court reminds counsel of its position regarding making distributions without court approval.

The matter is continued to Aug-31-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
